title: source-link and dag-transition op materialization
definition_of_done: SourceLink type added, Issue.SourceLinks and Provenance.DAGConfirmed fields added, applySourceLink and applyDAGTransition handlers; TestApplySourceLinkOp and TestApplyDAGTransitionOp pass
outcome: SourceLink type, Issue.SourceLinks, Provenance.DAGConfirmed added; applySourceLink and applyDAGTransition handlers; TestApplySourceLinkOp and TestApplyDAGTransitionOp pass

notes.msg: Implemented source-link and dag-transition op materialization: added SourceLink struct and Issue.SourceLinks field to state.go; added Provenance.DAGConfirmed bool; added SourceURL field to ops.Payload; added applySourceLink and applyDAGTransition handlers to engine.go replacing prior no-ops; added TestApplySourceLinkOp and TestApplyDAGTransitionOp; all tests pass, go build clean.
